prompt_variant: You are a critical academic research verifier. Your task: determine if a bibliog...
_search_results:
**Yes, the book exists.** Its exact title is *Thinking, Fast and Slow*, authored by **Daniel Kahneman**, published by **Farrar, Straus and Giroux**.[1][2][3][5]

Key publication details:
- Year: 2011 (first edition); a 2013 1st edition is also referenced.[2][3]
- ISBN: 9780374533557 (paperback).[3][5]
- Format: Paperback, 512 pages.[5]
- No DOI available, as it is a trade book rather than an academic paper; official publisher page: https://us.macmillan.com/books/9780374533557/thinkingfastandslow.[3]

The book is a popular science work on two cognitive systems: fast, intuitive **System 1** and slow, deliberative **System 2**.[1][2][3][4] It is not open access.[3]
